modules.name: fused_rmsnorm_swiglu_cuda
modules.prompt_context: This module is a fused normalization and gated activation kernel that is not covered by cuBLAS/cuDNN. It is usually memory-bandwidth limited and benefits from reducing global-memory traffic, keeping row reductions within a CTA, and using vectorized contiguous loads/stores when alignment allows.
schedule_hints: Prefer thread binding and tiling choices that keep each row or token block within a cooperative thread group.
Prioritize vectorized loads/stores for the contiguous hidden dimension.
Avoid transformations that split the reduction so aggressively that they increase global-memory round trips.
